expected_attack: warm rounded attack with reduced high partials
risk: May be too soft for small bars; wrapping can wear.
Too much bounce may double-strike; needs rebound test.
Durometer must be selected; adhesive bond may fail.
May compact over time and change tone.
Can dent softer bars; may be noisy mechanically.
Can sound harsh; may damage finished wood bars.

material_candidate: thin brass or aluminum cap over compliant backing
risk: High damage and glare risk; use only after sacrificial tests.
